query: How do I track my order?
gold_answer: Log into your StyleHub account and go to 'My Orders'. Click on the order number to see real-time tracking. You'll also receive tracking updates via email. Tracking typically updates every 4-6 hours once the package is in transit.

query: I haven't received a tracking number yet.
gold_answer: Tracking numbers are sent within 24-48 hours after order confirmation. During peak seasons (Black Friday, Christmas), this may take up to 72 hours. Check your spam folder. If you still haven't received it after 72 hours, contact us with your order number.

query: My tracking says 'label created' but hasn't moved in 3 days.
gold_answer: 'Label created' means we've prepared your shipment but the carrier hasn't scanned it yet. This usually resolves within 1-2 business days. If there's no update after 5 business days, contact us for investigation.

query: The tracking shows delivered but I didn't receive anything.
gold_answer: First, check with neighbors and any safe spots around your property. Look for a delivery notice. If using DHL, check your Packstation or local post office. Contact us within 7 days of the 'delivered' status so we can file an investigation with the carrier.

query: Can I track my order without an account?
gold_answer: Yes! Use the tracking link in your confirmation email, or go to stylehub.de/track and enter your order number and email address.

query: How long does delivery take?
gold_answer: Standard delivery (DHL): 2-4 business days within Germany, 3-5 business days to Austria/Switzerland. Express delivery (DHL Express): 1-2 business days. Business days exclude weekends and public holidays.

query: Do you deliver on weekends?
gold_answer: Standard DHL delivery may occur on Saturdays but not Sundays. DHL Express delivers Monday-Saturday. No deliveries on public holidays.

query: My order is taking longer than expected.
gold_answer: Delays can occur due to carrier issues, weather, or high order volumes. Check your tracking for updates. If your estimated delivery date has passed by more than 3 business days with no tracking updates, contact us for assistance.

query: What happens if I miss a delivery?
gold_answer: DHL will attempt redelivery or leave the package at a nearby Packstation, post office, or with a neighbor. You'll receive a notification card with pickup details. Packages are held for 7 days before being returned to us.

query: Can I change my delivery address after ordering?
gold_answer: Address changes are possible within 1 hour of ordering by contacting customer service. After the order has shipped, use DHL's delivery management service to redirect the package (fees may apply).

query: How much does shipping cost?
gold_answer: Germany: Free standard shipping on orders over €50, otherwise €4.95. Austria/Switzerland: Free on orders over €75, otherwise €7.95. Express shipping: additional €9.95 (Germany) or €14.95 (AT/CH).

query: Do you offer same-day delivery?
gold_answer: Same-day delivery is available in Berlin, Munich, and Hamburg for orders placed before 12:00. Additional fee of €12.95. Select 'Same-Day' at checkout if available for your address.

query: Can I pick up my order in a store?
gold_answer: We're online-only and don't have physical stores. However, you can select a DHL Packstation or Paketshop as your delivery address at checkout for convenient pickup.

query: Do you ship internationally outside DACH?
gold_answer: Currently, we only ship to Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. We're working on expanding to other EU countries. Sign up for our newsletter for updates.

query: My package shows 'returned to sender' - why?
gold_answer: Common reasons: incorrect address, recipient unknown at address, package unclaimed for 7+ days, or customs issues (AT/CH). We'll email you once we receive the return. You can request reshipment (shipping fees may apply) or a refund.

query: My package is stuck in customs (Austria/Switzerland).
gold_answer: Orders over €150 to Switzerland may require customs clearance. You'll receive paperwork from Swiss customs. Duties and taxes are the customer's responsibility. Contact Swiss Post or Austrian customs for clearance status.

query: The carrier says they attempted delivery but I was home all day.
gold_answer: Unfortunately, this occasionally happens. File a complaint with us and we'll escalate to the carrier. Meanwhile, check if the package was left at a pickup point. If unresolved after 5 business days, we'll reship or refund.

query: Can I request a specific delivery time window?
gold_answer: Standard shipping doesn't offer time windows. DHL Express allows you to select morning (before 12:00) or afternoon delivery for an additional €5. Use DHL's app to manage preferences after shipment.

query: What is your return policy?
gold_answer: You have 30 days from delivery to return items for any reason. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original condition with all tags attached. Sale items and underwear/swimwear (for hygiene reasons) are final sale unless defective.

query: How do I start a return?
gold_answer: Log into your account → 'My Orders' → Select order → Click 'Return Items' → Select items and reason → Print return label → Drop off at any DHL location. You'll receive confirmation once we process the return (5-7 business days after receipt).

query: Is return shipping free?
gold_answer: Your first return per order is free within Germany. Additional returns from the same order: €4.95 deducted from refund. Austria/Switzerland: €6.95 deducted per return. Defective items are always returned free of charge.

query: Can I return items bought in a sale?
gold_answer: Items discounted up to 30% can be returned normally. Items discounted more than 30% are final sale and cannot be returned unless defective. This is clearly marked on the product page and at checkout.

query: Can I return items without the original packaging?
gold_answer: The original product tags must be attached. The original shipping box isn't required - any secure packaging works. However, items must be protected during shipping; damage during return transit may affect your refund.

query: Can I return underwear or swimwear?
gold_answer: For hygiene reasons, underwear, swimwear, and earrings are final sale and cannot be returned unless defective. We recommend checking the size guide carefully before ordering.

query: I received an item as a gift - can I return it?
gold_answer: Yes! The gift recipient can return items using the order number. Refunds go to the original payment method. Alternatively, the purchaser can request a gift receipt enabling store credit for the recipient.

query: Can I return an item after 30 days?
gold_answer: Returns after 30 days are handled case-by-case. Contact customer service with your reason. For items with manufacturing defects, you have 24 months under German warranty law (Gewährleistung).

query: I wore the item once and don't like it - can I return it?
gold_answer: Items must be unworn for returns. If you've worn an item (beyond trying it on), we cannot accept the return. We want to ensure all customers receive items in perfect condition.

query: My item still has tags but was tried on and has deodorant marks.
gold_answer: Items with cosmetic marks, perfume smell, or other signs of use beyond trying on cannot be accepted for return. Please try items on carefully, ideally over undergarments.

query: How do I exchange an item for a different size?
gold_answer: We don't offer direct exchanges. Return the original item for a refund and place a new order for the correct size. To lock in sale prices, place the new order first, then return the original.

query: I want to exchange for the same item in a different color.
gold_answer: Same process as size exchanges: return original, order new. If the color is out of stock, sign up for back-in-stock notifications on the product page.

query: Can I exchange a sale item for a different size?
gold_answer: Sale items under 30% off: yes, via return and reorder. Sale items over 30% off: no exchanges or returns unless defective.

query: The size I need is out of stock - can you hold my return credit?
gold_answer: Refunds are processed automatically and cannot be held. However, you can use store credit (issued upon request instead of refund) which doesn't expire. Sign up for restock notifications.

query: I sent my return 2 weeks ago but haven't heard anything.
gold_answer: Return processing takes 5-7 business days after we receive the package. Add 2-4 days for shipping. Check tracking to confirm delivery to our warehouse. If delivered over 10 business days ago with no update, contact us with your return tracking number.

query: My return was rejected - why?
gold_answer: Common reasons: items worn/washed, tags removed, outside 30-day window, hygiene items, or items over 30% off. We'll email you explaining the reason and offer to ship items back (shipping at your cost) or donate them.

query: Can I drop off my return at a store?
gold_answer: We're online-only with no physical stores. Use any DHL location, Packstation, or Paketshop to send returns. Find locations at dhl.de/standortsuche.

query: I returned multiple items but only received partial refund.
gold_answer: Check your refund email for itemized details. Common reasons: some items didn't meet return conditions, or items were from different orders (processed separately). Contact us with specifics if you believe there's an error.

query: How do I find my size?
gold_answer: Each product page has a size guide with measurements in cm. Measure yourself and compare with our charts. If between sizes, we recommend sizing up for a comfortable fit or down for a slim fit.

query: Your sizes seem different from other brands I wear.
gold_answer: Sizing varies between brands. Don't rely on your usual size - always check our specific measurements. Our size guide shows garment measurements, not body measurements, unless stated otherwise.

query: Do you have a fit recommendation tool?
gold_answer: Yes! On select items, click 'Find My Fit' and enter your height, weight, and fit preference. Our AI recommends the best size based on return data from similar customers.

query: What's the difference between 'Regular Fit' and 'Slim Fit'?
gold_answer: Regular Fit: classic cut with room for comfort. Slim Fit: closer to the body, tailored silhouette. Relaxed Fit: loose and oversized. Each product description indicates the fit type.

query: I'm 175cm and usually wear M - what size should I order?
gold_answer: Height alone isn't enough to determine size. Please measure your chest, waist, and hips and compare with our size guide. Our customer service can help if you share your measurements.

query: Do your jeans stretch out after wearing?
gold_answer: Jeans with high elastane content (3%+) may stretch 0.5-1 size with wear. Jeans with 1-2% elastane hold their shape better. If between sizes in stretch denim, consider sizing down.

query: Your blazers seem small in the shoulders - should I size up?
gold_answer: Our blazers are designed with a European cut (narrower shoulders). If you have broad shoulders, we recommend sizing up and potentially having the waist tailored for best fit.

query: Do your shirts shrink after washing?
gold_answer: 100% cotton items may shrink 3-5% after first wash. We recommend washing cold and air drying. Pre-washed items (noted in description) won't shrink further. Blended fabrics (cotton/polyester) shrink minimally.

query: The model is wearing size M but I'm the same height and M doesn't fit me.
gold_answer: Models are selected for standard proportions. Fit depends on body shape, not just height. Models' measurements are listed on product pages. Compare your measurements to theirs and the size guide.

query: How do shoe sizes run - should I size up or down?
gold_answer: Our shoes run true to EU sizing. If between sizes, size up for sneakers/boots (thick socks) and your normal size for dress shoes. Width is standard/medium; wide-foot customers may need to size up.

query: Where can I find exact measurements for a specific item?
gold_answer: Click 'Size & Fit' on any product page for a measurement table. Measurements include chest, waist, length, shoulder width, and sleeve length depending on garment type.

query: Can you measure a specific item and tell me the exact dimensions?
gold_answer: Yes! Contact customer service with the product name, size, and which measurements you need. We'll measure an item from current stock and respond within 24 hours.

query: I have an item I love from another brand - can you compare measurements?
gold_answer: Provide the brand, item name, size, and its measurements. We'll compare with our similar items and recommend the closest match. Photos help too!

query: Do plus sizes have the same proportions as regular sizes?
gold_answer: Our plus range (XL-3XL) is specifically designed for larger bodies, not just scaled up. They feature adjusted armholes, longer torso, and roomier hips for better fit and comfort.

query: I'm between sizes - should I order both and return one?
gold_answer: You can! This is called 'bracketing.' Remember: your first return per order is free, but additional returns incur a fee. Check our detailed size guide first to avoid unnecessary returns.

query: I'm pregnant - any sizing recommendations for your dresses?
gold_answer: Our wrap dresses and A-line styles work well during pregnancy. Size up 1-2 sizes from your pre-pregnancy size. Check the 'Stretch' and 'Adjustable' filters for flexible options.

query: Do men's and women's sizes differ in your unisex items?
gold_answer: Unisex items use men's sizing. Women typically size down 1-2 sizes. E.g., women who wear M in women's would try S or XS in unisex.

query: How long until I receive my refund?
gold_answer: Refund timeline: Return received → Processing (5-7 business days) → Refund initiated → Appears in account (3-5 business days for credit cards, 5-7 for PayPal, up to 10 for bank transfers). Total: 10-20 business days from return shipment.

query: I haven't received my refund and it's been 3 weeks.
gold_answer: First, check your return tracking to confirm we received it. Check spam for refund confirmation emails. If we received your return over 14 business days ago with no refund, contact us with your order number and return tracking.

query: Can I get a refund to a different payment method?
gold_answer: Refunds go to the original payment method by default. Exceptions: expired credit cards (contact your bank - they can usually still receive it) or closed PayPal accounts (we'll need bank details).

query: Why is my refund less than what I paid?
gold_answer: Possible reasons: return shipping fee deducted (€4.95-€6.95), discount code that applied to returned items, or partial return (remaining items still shipping). Check your refund email for itemized breakdown.

query: Can I get store credit instead of a refund?
gold_answer: Yes! Select 'Store Credit' when initiating your return. Store credit is issued immediately upon return receipt (vs. waiting for payment processing), never expires, and includes a bonus 5% extra value.

query: What payment methods do you accept?
gold_answer: Credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, Klarna (Pay Later, Installments), SOFORT, Giropay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfer (Vorkasse). Payment options vary by country.

query: Can I pay in installments?
gold_answer: Yes, via Klarna. Split into 3 interest-free payments over 60 days, or pay within 30 days ('Pay Later'). Klarna performs a soft credit check. Available for orders €35-€1500.

query: My payment was declined but the money was taken.
gold_answer: This is likely a temporary hold/authorization that will be released within 3-5 business days. If the amount was actually charged (transaction completed, not pending), contact us immediately.

query: Can I change my payment method after ordering?
gold_answer: Payment method cannot be changed after order placement. You would need to cancel (if possible) and reorder. Cancellation is only possible before shipment.

query: I returned my items but Klarna is still asking me to pay.
gold_answer: Klarna and our refund system are not instant. Continue to receive Klarna reminders until the refund is processed (up to 14 days after we receive your return). Do not pay - we will update Klarna. If charges persist after 21 days, contact us.

query: Klarna rejected my payment - why?
gold_answer: Klarna performs independent credit assessments. Common reasons: first order (no purchase history), high order value, or Klarna's risk assessment. This isn't a reflection of your credit score. Try another payment method.

query: I want to return part of my Klarna order - how does billing work?
gold_answer: Your Klarna invoice will be adjusted automatically once we process the return. You'll receive an updated invoice from Klarna. Only pay for items you're keeping.

query: Can I use multiple discount codes on one order?
gold_answer: Only one discount code can be applied per order. However, discount codes can be combined with gift cards. Newsletter signup discount can't be combined with other codes.

query: I forgot to apply my discount code - can you add it retroactively?
gold_answer: We cannot modify orders after placement. For codes with remaining validity, place a new order with the code and cancel the original (if not yet shipped). For expired codes, contact us - we may issue a one-time exception.

query: My gift card balance isn't showing correctly.
gold_answer: Check your remaining balance at stylehub.de/giftcard. Gift cards don't expire. If the balance seems incorrect, contact us with the gift card number and we'll investigate.

query: Do discount codes apply to sale items?
gold_answer: Most discount codes exclude sale items (items already reduced). Codes that work on sale items will say 'valid on all items' in the terms. Sign up for our newsletter for occasional 'extra discount on sale' promotions.

query: I received a defective item - what do I do?
gold_answer: Contact us within 14 days with photos of the defect. We'll issue a prepaid return label (always free for defects). Choose replacement or full refund. Don't wash or alter the item before returning.

query: The stitching came undone after one wash.
gold_answer: This is a manufacturing defect covered under our quality guarantee. Contact us with photos. If within 6 months of purchase, defect is assumed to have existed at delivery (you don't need to prove it). We'll replace or refund.

query: My item has a small flaw - is it worth reporting?
gold_answer: Yes! Even small flaws help us improve quality control. For minor issues (loose thread, tiny stain), we may offer a partial refund (10-20%) so you can keep the item. For anything affecting wearability, full return/replacement.

query: The item broke after 3 months of normal wear.
gold_answer: Under German warranty law (Gewährleistung), you have 24 months for manufacturing defects. Contact us with photos and describe normal wear circumstances. Defects from misuse (wrong washing, excessive wear) aren't covered.

query: The color looks different than on the website.
gold_answer: Colors can appear differently on screens. We try for accuracy, but slight variations occur. If the color is significantly different (e.g., shown as navy, arrived as black), contact us with photos for a free return/exchange.

query: The material feels cheaper than expected.
gold_answer: We list all materials and their percentages on product pages. 'Feel' is subjective, but if the material composition differs from what's listed, contact us with a photo of the care label for investigation.

query: The item is much thinner than I expected from photos.
gold_answer: We include fabric weight (g/m²) where relevant. For transparency concerns (especially white items), check reviews. If the product description mentions 'lightweight' or 'sheer,' that's intentional. Contact us if it differs significantly from description.

query: I ordered a printed shirt but the print is lower quality than in photos.
gold_answer: Product photos show items in ideal conditions. Minor variations in print placement or color intensity can occur. Significant differences (blurry print, wrong design) are defects - contact us with photos.

query: I received the wrong item entirely.
gold_answer: We apologize! Contact us immediately with a photo of what you received and your order number. We'll ship the correct item via express (free) and provide a prepaid label for the wrong item. Keep the wrong item until you have the return label.

query: I received the right item but wrong size.
gold_answer: Check your order confirmation - if we shipped the wrong size, that's our error. Contact us for free express replacement. If you accidentally ordered the wrong size, standard return policy applies.

query: My order is missing an item.
gold_answer: Check if items ship separately (you'll have multiple tracking numbers). Check inside packing material for small items. If an item is missing, contact us within 7 days. We'll investigate with our warehouse and reship if confirmed missing.

query: I received someone else's order.
gold_answer: Don't open if possible. Contact us with photos of the shipping label. We'll arrange pickup of the wrong package and ship your correct order immediately. Thank you for your honesty!

query: My item shrank after washing - is this defective?
gold_answer: If you followed care label instructions and significant shrinkage occurred, contact us. If care instructions weren't followed (e.g., hot wash when label says cold), shrinkage isn't considered a defect. Always check care labels before first wash.

query: The care label says 'dry clean only' - is that really necessary?
gold_answer: We include this when materials may not survive home washing. You can try gentle hand washing at own risk, but we can't accept returns for damage from ignoring care instructions.

query: The color bled when I washed it.
gold_answer: Some dyes (especially indigo in denim) may release excess dye initially. Wash separately first. If excessive bleeding continues after multiple washes or stains other items, contact us - this may be a defect.

query: How do I place an order?
gold_answer: Browse products → Add to cart → Proceed to checkout → Enter shipping address → Select shipping method → Choose payment → Confirm order. You can checkout as guest or create an account for faster future orders.

query: Can I order by phone?
gold_answer: We don't take orders by phone. All orders must be placed through stylehub.de. Our phone support can help with questions but cannot process payments for security reasons.

query: Is there a minimum order value?
gold_answer: No minimum for standard orders. Free shipping requires €50 (Germany) or €75 (AT/CH). Klarna Pay Later requires minimum €35.

query: Can I order items that are out of stock?
gold_answer: Out-of-stock items cannot be ordered. Click 'Notify Me' to receive an email when restocked. Popular items typically restock within 2-4 weeks. Some seasonal items won't return.

query: Can I cancel my order?
gold_answer: Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour of placement via your account. After that, cancellation depends on processing status. Contact us immediately - if not yet packed, we can usually cancel. Once shipped, you'll need to refuse delivery or return.

query: Can I add items to my order after placing it?
gold_answer: We cannot add items to existing orders. Place a separate order. If both orders are placed within 2 hours, contact us and we may be able to combine shipping (no guarantee).

query: Can I change the size of an item after ordering?
gold_answer: Changes aren't possible after order confirmation. Cancel (if within 1 hour) and reorder, or wait to receive and return for exchange.

query: I entered the wrong address - what do I do?
gold_answer: Contact us immediately! Before shipment: we can update the address. After shipment: we'll try to intercept with DHL (not always possible). You may need to use DHL's delivery management to redirect.

query: I forgot my password.
gold_answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your email and we'll send a reset link (valid 24 hours). Check spam folder. If you don't receive it, ensure you're using the email associated with your account.

query: How do I delete my account?
gold_answer: Go to Account Settings → Privacy → 'Delete Account.' This removes personal data within 30 days. Order history is retained for legal purposes (7 years) but anonymized. Pending orders or returns must be completed first.

query: Can I have multiple shipping addresses saved?
gold_answer: Yes! Go to Account → Address Book → Add New Address. You can save unlimited addresses and select your preferred one at checkout.

query: How do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?
gold_answer: Click 'Unsubscribe' at the bottom of any marketing email, or go to Account → Communication Preferences. Note: transactional emails (order confirmations, shipping updates) cannot be unsubscribed - these are essential communications.

query: I placed an order but didn't receive confirmation.
gold_answer: Check spam/junk folder. Ensure email address was entered correctly. Log into your account - if the order appears in 'My Orders,' it was successful. No order in account + no confirmation = order wasn't completed (payment may have failed).

query: My order shows 'Processing' for 3 days.
gold_answer: Orders typically ship within 1-2 business days. During peak times (sales, holidays), processing may take 3-4 business days. 'Processing' for 5+ business days is unusual - contact us to check status.

query: I was charged twice for my order.
gold_answer: Double authorizations sometimes appear but only one is actually charged. Wait 3-5 business days for the duplicate to clear. If both are actual charges (not pending), contact us immediately with screenshots.

query: I ordered 3 sizes of the same item - which return is free?
gold_answer: Your first return of items from that order is free (regardless of quantity). If you return all 3 sizes separately in different shipments, only the first shipment is free; subsequent shipments incur €4.95 each. Combine returns when possible.

query: Item was on sale when I bought it, now it's cheaper - can I get the difference?
gold_answer: We don't price match after purchase. However, you could return the item (if within 30 days and eligible) and rebuy at the lower price. Consider whether return shipping fees make this worthwhile.

query: I bought an item, it went on sale, and now I want to return it. Do I get what I paid or the sale price?
gold_answer: You receive refund for what you actually paid, not current price. Keep your order confirmation as proof of purchase price.

query: My item was damaged during return shipping - who is responsible?
gold_answer: If you used our prepaid label, we're responsible - contact us for resolution. If you arranged your own shipping, you're responsible for items until they reach our warehouse. We recommend tracking and insurance for self-arranged returns.

query: I received a damaged package but the item inside is fine.
gold_answer: Please document the packaging damage (photos) and report to us anyway. This helps us address carrier issues. If the item is fine, no return needed, but we appreciate the feedback.

query: I'm buying a gift but it might need to be returned - can the recipient return it?
gold_answer: Yes! Recipients can return using the order number. Refund goes to original payer. For more privacy, request a digital gift receipt at purchase - recipient gets store credit instead.

query: I bought items for an event that was cancelled. Can I return worn items?
gold_answer: Items must be unworn and with tags for returns. If you've worn them, we cannot accept the return even with a valid reason. Consider reselling through platforms like Vinted or eBay.

query: I have a complaint about customer service I received.
gold_answer: We're sorry to hear that. Please email feedback@stylehub.de with details (date, agent name if known, description). Management reviews all feedback. We'll respond within 48 hours.

query: Can I get a discount for a negative experience?
gold_answer: We address problems by fixing them (replacement, refund, etc.) rather than discounts. If you've had a particularly poor experience, contact us - we handle these case-by-case. Our goal is to make things right.

query: What are my rights under Widerrufsrecht (right of withdrawal)?
gold_answer: EU consumers have 14 days from receipt to withdraw from distance purchases without giving reasons. StyleHub extends this to 30 days. You must return items within 14 days of declaring withdrawal. Hygiene-sealed items opened by you are excluded.

query: What's the difference between Widerrufsrecht and Gewährleistung?
gold_answer: Widerrufsrecht: 14-30 day 'no reason needed' return right. Gewährleistung: 24-month legal warranty for defects - item must be defective, not just unwanted. After 30 days, only Gewährleistung applies for quality issues.

query: I suspect my item is counterfeit.
gold_answer: All StyleHub products are authentic, sourced directly from brands or authorized distributors. If you have concerns, contact us with photos and we'll verify. You can also check authenticity markers specific to each brand.

query: How is my data used?
gold_answer: See our Privacy Policy at stylehub.de/privacy. Summary: we use data for order fulfillment, communication, and (with consent) marketing. We don't sell data to third parties. You can request data deletion anytime.

query: Do you have a loyalty program?
gold_answer: Yes! StyleClub members earn 1 point per €1 spent. 100 points = €5 reward. Silver (500 pts/year): free returns always. Gold (1000 pts/year): early sale access + free express shipping. Join free in your account.

query: My loyalty points disappeared.
gold_answer: Points expire after 12 months of account inactivity. Make a purchase or log in to keep them active. If you believe points are missing incorrectly, contact us with your account email.

query: Can I use rewards points and a discount code together?
gold_answer: Yes! Points redemption works alongside one discount code. Maximum discount: 50% of order value (points + codes combined).

query: How can I contact customer service?
gold_answer: Email: support@stylehub.de (response within 24h). Live Chat: stylehub.de, Mon-Fri 9-18. Phone: +49 30 1234567, Mon-Fri 8-20, Sat 10-16. Social: Instagram/Facebook DM @stylehub.de.

query: What's the fastest way to get help?
gold_answer: Live chat during business hours for simple questions (order status, tracking). Email for complex issues requiring investigation. Phone for urgent matters. Average response: Chat <5min, Email <24h, Phone <10min wait.

query: I sent an email 3 days ago with no response.
gold_answer: Check spam folder for our reply. During peak times, responses may take 48-72h. If urgent, use live chat or phone. Include your order number in all communications for faster handling.

query: Do you have a customer service presence on social media?
gold_answer: We monitor Instagram and Facebook DMs during business hours. For account-specific issues, email is more secure. Social is great for general questions or product recommendations.

query: When should I contact customer service vs. wait?
gold_answer: Contact us if: tracking hasn't updated in 5+ days, item is defective, wrong item received, payment issues. Wait/self-service: order just placed (give 24-48h), return just sent (processing takes 5-7 days), minor tracking delays (<3 days past estimate).

query: When do you have sales?
gold_answer: Major sales: Summer (July), Black Friday/Cyber Monday (November), Winter (January). Flash sales throughout the year for newsletter subscribers. Follow us on social media for announcements.

query: Items I want are never in stock during sales - tips?
gold_answer: Sale stock is limited. Subscribe to restock notifications for specific items. StyleClub Gold members get 24h early access. Add items to wishlist - we'll notify you of price drops.

query: The sale price changed while item was in my cart.
gold_answer: Cart prices aren't locked - they reflect current prices at checkout. Sale prices can change or sell out. Complete purchase promptly to secure sale prices.

query: Can I use my birthday discount on sale items?
gold_answer: Birthday discounts (15% off, valid 7 days) work on full-price items only. Combine with sale items in your cart - discount applies to eligible items only.

query: Do you offer gift wrapping?
gold_answer: Yes! Add gift wrapping at checkout for €3.95 per item. Includes branded box, tissue paper, and ribbon. Add a personalized message (100 characters max).

query: Can I send orders directly to someone as a gift?
gold_answer: Absolutely! Enter their address as shipping address. Select 'This is a gift' at checkout to exclude prices from packing slip and add gift message.

query: Do you sell gift cards?
gold_answer: Digital gift cards from €25-€200 at stylehub.de/giftcard. Delivered by email instantly or scheduled. Never expire. Physical gift cards available during holiday season (Nov-Dec).
